channel.title: Whitman Energy Solutions
channel.description: Recent content on Whitman Energy Solutions

item.title: Power Systems
item.description:
Power Market & Regulatory Expertise

  • Advised on electricity market design and pricing rules, including scarcity pricing, uplift and real-time price formation
  • Evaluated tariffs, rulemakings, and interconnection agreements for consistency with statutory requirements
  • Developed market monitoring and mitigation approaches to detect market power and ensure compliance
  • Modeled impacts of policy and regulatory changes on prices, investment, and system operations

item.title: NEMS
item.description:
Services

  • NEMS install and set-up
  • Solver tuning (CPLEX performance optimization)
  • Model debugging and restructuring

Selected Work

  • Reducing model runtime through software tuning
  • Improving convergence in large-scale LP models
  • Extending modeling capabilities through new technologies such as hydrogen production
